headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: - Section 49. Modification or Alteration of Agreement. This Subcontract may not be modified, altered, revised, supplemented, or changed in any way, unless said change is evidenced by a single writing that is executed by both Subcontractor and Contractor, or a written order for changes, deviations, additions or omissions to the Subcontract Work under Section 15 of this Subcontract.
